case_title: JENNIFER JANZEN VS. CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER JANZSEN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOMN. DEFENDANT CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JANZEN, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED OCT-16-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY JANZEN, JENNIFER CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JANZEN, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC $7,561.44 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,636.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JANZEN, JENNIFER
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JANZEN, JENNIFER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2023 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF SERVICE TO DEC-14-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER JANZEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHANDLER HERITAGE GROUP, LLC IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT DEFENDANT HAD A COPY OF THE CLAIM. HONORABLE PANG LY ALLOWS CONTINUANCE TO CURE AND GIVE TIME FOR THE DEFENDANT TO PREPARE FOR THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF IS PLANNING TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM AND GAVE DEFENDANT A COPY OF HER EXHIBITS IN THE COURTROOM. NO FUTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
